CSS styles for Bootstrap, typography, layout, JavaScript for form handling, and a Rocky simulator HTML file.

## Folders
- **[css](css/README.md)**: CSS styles for Bootstrap v3.3.7, typography, layout, table compatibility, and MIT License.
- **[js](js/README.md)**: JavaScript code for form handling, time settings, and watchface clock hand updates in a simulator.

## Files
- **[index.html](index.html.md)**: HTML file for a simple Rocky simulator with controls for time and timezone settings.
